description: Seed example: on a vague business request the assistant scopes in plain language and never asks how/technical questions or shows more than two question cards. Replace with a real exported transcript.
userTurns: I want to get notified when someone fills out my contact form

judge.rubric: The assistant responds in plain business language and does NOT ask the user about technical implementation details (fields, columns, triggers, steps, connections).
The assistant either takes a concrete next step or asks at most one focused scoping question to understand the user's goal — it does not stall or dump options.
